headings: IV. Insurance Policy Deductibles and Self-Insured Retentions.
text: - f. Payment  Terms. If  Owner  assesses  a  Deductible  Contribution(s)  against  an Involved Party, then that Deductible Contribution(s) shall be due and payable to Owner within ten  (10)  days  after  Owner's  written  demand.    Owner  may  back -charge  the  Involved  Party,  may  withhold  from  monies  otherwise  owing  to  the Involved Party or may collect by any other lawful means, the amount(s) owed by the Involved Party as its allocated portion of the Deductible Contribution(s). The Deductible Contributions shall remain uninsured by the Involved Party and will not be covered by the OCIP Policies, nor shall it be included in the Contract Price or GMP.
